passport.label: Passport number
passport.help: Use the passport number from the photo page. No spaces or dashes.

errors.tooShort: Passport number too short — min 6 characters
errors.tooLong: Passport number too long — max 12 characters
errors.invalidChars: Letters and numbers only — no spaces or symbols

full_name.label: Full name
full_name.help: Use the Latin spelling from your passport.

date_of_birth.label: Date of birth
date_of_birth.help: Use YYYY-MM-DD in this local checker.

errors.tooEarly: Date of birth seems too far in the past
errors.tooLate: Date of birth cannot be in the future

flight_number.label: Flight or vessel number
flight_number.help: Use the operating carrier code and flight number.

errors.required: Flight or vessel number is required
errors.invalidFormat: Use carrier code + number, e.g. PR103

arrival_date.label: Arrival date
arrival_date.help: Date you arrive in the Philippines.

email.label: Email
email.help: Use an inbox you can open at the airport.
